# reset()

**Instance Method**

Resets a vertex descriptor to its default state.

## Declaration

```swift
func reset()
```

## Discussion

Calling this method returns the descriptor to its original state, as is produced when initializing a vertex descriptor with the inherited [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/ObjectiveC/NSObject-swift.class/init()] method. After calling this method, the descriptor contains a single empty [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexAttribute] object and a single empty [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLVertexBufferLayout] object.
title: reset()
